title: PopDimple's Better Beds
body:
Tired of the same old, blocky bed? PopDimple's Better Beds is a high-quality resource pack that completely overhauls the standard Minecraft bed model, giving it more detail, charm, and personality—all while perfectly preserving the beloved vanilla art style.
This isn't a dramatic reimagining; it's a faithful vanilla-plus enhancement.

![Bed in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72acd2fddf4100ee7235445b386c22e961a41626.png)
# Compatibility:
**- OptiFine / CIT Required**
